name: @ansvar/workflow-intelligence-mcp
description: Workflow definitions, domain intelligence, and quality gates for structured assessments

scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p dist/definitions/manifests dist/definitions/tasks dist/definitions/overlays && cp src/definitions/manifests/*.json dist/definitions/manifests/ && cp src/definitions/tasks/*.json dist/definitions/tasks/ && cp src/definitions/overlays/*.json dist/definitions/overlays/

author: Ansvar Systems
